title: croton leiophyllus
intro: Croton leiophyllus, also known as the Philippine croton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine in the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Croton leiophyllus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Croton leiophyllus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
